title: 第2節　桜吹雪の土手
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same riverside-start incident as scene-001-001-002-sato.
Keep the same embankment, same blossom storm, and same morning light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner and must face along his route rather than toward Sera or the attacker.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第1話　走る支度. Scene focus: 第2節　桜吹雪の土手 / セラパート. Summary: その少し後方では、ロードバイク乗りを装った男と、イヤホン姿のランナーに化けた女が、遊歩道の幅が狭くなる地点で呼吸を合わせていた。片方が歩道寄りへ寄せ、もう片方が肩口へ触れる。転… Key beats: その少し後方では、ロードバイク乗りを装った男と、イヤホン姿のランナーに化けた女が、遊歩道の幅が狭くなる地点で呼吸を合わせていた。片方が歩道寄りへ寄せ、もう片方が肩口へ触れる。転倒そのものではなく、そのあとに生まれる一瞬の混乱が狙いだ。桜の時期の河川敷なら、ちょっとした接触事故にしか見えない。 セラは猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットへ入る雑音の違和感で、その動線を先に拾った。可愛らしいメイド風ジョギングウェアは見た目こそ柔らかいが、走るための裁断はよくできている。裾も袖も動きを邪魔しない。彼女は土手の芝側へわずかに体を逃がし、二人の交差点へ角度だけを合わせた。 「花見客のふりをするには、足元が急ぎすぎです」 まずバイクの前輪へ、小石ほどの制動片を滑らせる。車体は大きく倒れず、ただ速度だけを失った。次の瞬間には、女のランナーの肘へセラの手が入り、肩の向きだけが外へ反れる。ふたりの動線はきれいに交わらず、桜の花びらを散らしただけで終わった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same riverside-start incident as scene-001-001-002-sato. Keep the same embankment, same blossom storm, and same morning light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background runner and must face along his route rather than toward Sera or the attacker. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert riverside action image with Sera dominant on the same cherry-blossom embankment, intercepting a cyclist or runner infiltrator who is trying to cause a collision. Keep Sato smaller in the background, still enjoying his pace and unaware.
